summary.en: Product-minded Full Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years architecting scalable microservices and backend systems across fintech and enterprise domains. Known for anticipating needs before they become bottlenecks — standardizing development workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and test infrastructure that keep teams shipping fast as they grow. Proficient in .NET Core, Golang, and cloud-native platforms (Azure, Oracle Cloud, Kubernetes); CKAD-certified with a strict test-driven approach. Founder of the Coding Afternoon tech-education platform and a two-time GDG Kaohsiung speaker.

description.en: Standardizes workflows, CI/CD pipelines, and test infrastructure ahead of team growth — removing friction before it becomes technical debt.
Designs for tomorrow's traffic and teams: modular microservices, decoupled domains, and unified auth that scale without rewrites.
Runs Coding Afternoon solo — from identifying audience needs to UX, backend, and the automated publishing pipeline behind it.
CKAD-certified; builds observability (ELK on Kubernetes), tunes queries, and treats production stability as a first-class requirement.

details.en: Spearheading Asia-region service integration for a global vehicle-care platform, owning the regional .NET Core architecture end to end.

achievements.en: Built cross-regional .NET Core services supporting Asia-market operations, designed so future markets onboard through configuration rather than re-architecture
Acting as regional technical owner, translating Asia-market business requirements into platform capabilities ahead of expansion

details.en: Self-initiated tech-education platform (coding-afternoon.com) with full-lifecycle product ownership — from market analysis to high-availability deployment.

achievements.en: Identified a gap in practical backend-engineering education and built the platform end to end: content strategy, UX, backend, and an automated subscription pipeline
Authored three 30-day technical series (Design Patterns in Golang, Golang TDD with AI, building an editable blockchain) and published an open-source NuGet SDK (EccSDK)
Leveraged technical writing and mentoring to bridge complex backend architecture and developer onboarding, fostering a culture of continuous learning

details.en: Architected the migration of a credit-loan platform from monolith to microservices and established the company's cloud-native infrastructure on Oracle Cloud.

achievements.en: Spearheaded the migration of the credit loan system from a monolith to microservices, decoupling deployments so services release independently
Redesigned the strategy module to isolate business rules from loan-processing logic, enabling new loan products to launch without touching core code
Implemented unified SSO/OAuth authentication across internal services, eliminating duplicated login logic ahead of service expansion
Standardized CI/CD on Azure DevOps and established cloud-native production infrastructure on Oracle Cloud (OCI), replacing manual deployments with automated release pipelines
Provisioned reproducible test environments (OracleDB, Redis, identity services), shortening feedback loops and improving developer experience across the team

details.en: Developed payment processing and third-party API integrations; raised the team's engineering bar through TDD, hexagonal architecture, and DevOps practices.

achievements.en: Led the intern team as Scrum Master, running workshops on hexagonal architecture, TDD, and refactoring to level up engineering practices
Drove container adoption through Docker and Kubernetes workshops, upskilling the team on cloud-native deployment
Built ELK-stack observability for Kubernetes services, giving the team end-to-end visibility into distributed systems
Refactored a legacy payment codebase and resolved production bugs that had persisted for over two years
Represented the team externally as a two-time GDG Kaohsiung speaker (Golang tooling, developer productivity)

education.title: Master of Computer Science
education.sub_title: National Yunlin University of Science and Technology, YunTech

details.en: Researched Blockchain and Network Security; thesis on a secure encryption scheme called Chameleon Hash.

education.title: Bachelor of Information and Telecommunication Engineering

details.en: Focused on Blockchain and Network Security research.
